name: stronghold-toast
description: A framework-agnostic, medieval-themed Web Component that provides animated toast notifications with integrated, localized audio feedback (English and Hungarian). Inspired by *Stronghold Crusader*.

scripts.build:assets: node scripts/import-audio.js && node scripts/convert-audio.js && node scripts/validate-assets.js && node scripts/generate-registry.js

author: Zoltáni Szabolcs
